summary: Add internal/cli/gam_helpers.go (network-scoped live fetch + mirror cache) and rework the store-backed novel commands (adunits tree, inventory orphans, since, order graph) to fetch live when the local mirror is empty.
reason: Generated 'sync' cannot fill the RFC 6570 reserved-expansion {+parent}=networks/{code} path parameter, so the local mirror never populates and every store-only command returned empty. gamLoadResource resolves this with a mirror-first, network-scoped-GET-and-cache fallback so the commands work without a pre-populated mirror.
validated_outcome: adunits tree, inventory orphans, since, and order graph all returned live data against the GAM network via --network with an empty local mirror.
